name: Wide Split Confrontation
description: Two or more figures on opposite sides of a divided frame.
hld_patterns: {setting}. Two figures face each other across the space between them.
{setting}. A standoff — opposing figures on each side of the frame.
{setting}. Figures split across the frame, facing one another.
background_pool: A long corridor of arched stone, shafts of dusty light cutting across the floor from high windows, the center empty and echoing, distant arch receding into shadow
A narrow bridge of rusted metal spanning a chasm, cables snapping upward into fog, the void dropping away on both sides, wind-blown mist obscuring the far end
A wide canyon floor with sheer sandstone walls, a dry wash running down the center, boulders providing cover on either side, relentless sun overhead
A cathedral nave, rows of broken pews dividing the space, stained glass casting fragmented colored light across stone floors, vaulted ceiling lost in shadow above
An urban alley at night, brick walls closing in from both sides, fire escapes climbing like skeletons, a single streetlight pooling sodium glow at one end, steam rising from a vent
action_pool: unbuttoning a jacket, hand moving inside
weight shifting to the balls of their feet
lips parting, speaking a single word
